title: anacamptis × timbali nothosubsp. ugrinskyana
intro: Anacamptis × timbali nothosubsp. ugrinskyana, also known as the Balkan Orchid or Ugrinskyana, is a hybrid orchid species native to Eastern Europe. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Anacamptis × timbali nothosubsp. ugrinskyana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
